chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1149 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.10.2025. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State alongwith ASI Sultan Mehmood Soomro CIA Badin. = On the last date of hearing this Bench had passed the orders calling for a report from the concerned Magistrate regarding current status of the challan submitted by I.O wherein charging Section 395 PPC has been deleted and substituted with Section 392 PPC. It appears that no such report is available in file. Office is directed to ensure compliance. Be that as it may, Counsel for the applicant during the course of this order submits that he no longer wishes to press this bail application for the reason that a fresh challan has been presented before the Court of Magistrate and he will take his chances before the said Court and file fresh bail application before the concerned Court. Accordingly, in view of the submission made by the counsel for applicant, this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn subject to all legal consequences from such withdrawal. JUDGE Tufail
